citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:00 PM on
03/12/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee by showing up at the office but a facility representative was not
available for inspection today. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of
the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 2:00 PM on 
03/12/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee by showing up at the office but a facility representative was not 
available for inspection today. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of 
the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
